name: Reverse or Bind Shell Detected
notes: This rule detects any reverse or bind shell. This is a shell connection initiated from the target host to the attacker host.
conditions_text: when the event context is Local to Remote
when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.Connection Opened Success
when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of Networking Utility Commands - AlphaNumeric
TD_list: APPLY Reverse or Bind Shell Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Local to Remote
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.Connection Opened Success
AND when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of Networking Utility Commands - AlphaNumeric
RED_list: Event name: Reverse or Bind Shell Detected
Event description: Detects a reverse or bind shell connection.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Container ID (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
